title: V FLOW AI Studio | V FLOW AI
bodyPreview:
V FLOW AI
AI STUDIO

STUDIO ONBOARDING

Open Studio in three simple steps.

Choose an account path, finish setup only if prompted, and land in Studio ready to import a script or try the demo.

1

Create your account or sign in

We keep the path short and only ask for what is needed.

2

Complete user ID setup if prompted

This step only appears when your account needs it.

3

Enter Studio and start a script

Import a file or try the demo scene to see the workflow right away.
